rationale: This skill is a static security review of GitHub Actions workflows performed entirely via local file reading and grep-based pattern matching. It explicitly lists files to review (.github/workflows/*.yml, action.yml, local composite actions, CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/Makefile/shell scripts) and references (references/*.md) that the agent loads selectively. The allowed-tools are Read, Grep, Glob, Bash, Task — no network or write operations are implied; Bash is likely used only for read-only inspection commands like grep/find/git. No outputs are written to disk and no external hosts are contacted.
